content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission
July 16,
1992
Joseph A.
Lumsdaine
Downey Taxpayers United
P.O.
Box 39293
Downey,
CA
90239
RE:
Your Request for Advice
Our File No.
G-92-331
Dear Mr.
Lumsdaine:
This is in response to your letter requesting advice on
behalf of the Downey Taxpayers United
(DTU)
concerning DTU’s
filing requirements pursuant to the campaign provisions of the
Political Reform Act
(the “Act”).l/
Because your request seeks
advice on past conduct, Regulation 18329(b) (8) (A)
(copy enclosed)
provides that formal written advice must be declined.
The
Commission’s Enforcement Division will be responding to your
letter providing you with general guidance pursuant to Regulation
18329(c) (3) .2/
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel
By:
Mary Ann Kvasagëj
Political Reform Consultant
Enclosure
1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015.
All statutory references
are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
Commission
regulations appear at
2 California Code of Regulations Section
18000, et g.
All references to regulations are to Title 2,
Division
6 of the California Code of Regulations.
2/ Informal Assistance does not provide the requestor with the
immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice.
(Government Code Section 83114;
2 Cal.
Code of Regs.
Section
18329 Cc) (3).)
428 J Street, Suite 800
•
P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 9$04-0807 • (916)32266

sections.conclusion: Because the request seeks advice on past conduct, formal written advice must be declined pursuant to Regulation 18329(b)(8)(A). The Commission's Enforcement Division will provide general guidance pursuant to Regulation 18329(c)(3).
sections.question_synthetic: DTU requested advice on its filing requirements under the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declines to provide formal written advice because the request concerns past conduct, but will instead have the Enforcement Division provide informal general guidance.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a declination letter with no separate QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. The legal question and FPPC's response are embedded in the body text. The document explicitly states formal advice is being declined and informal assistance will be provided instead.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: DTU requested advice on its filing requirements under the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act.

CONCLUSION: Because the request seeks advice on past conduct, formal written advice must be declined pursuant to Regulation 18329(b)(8)(A). The Commission's Enforcement Division will provide general guidance pursuant to Regulation 18329(c)(3).
embedding.first_500_words: California Fair Political Practices Commission July 16, 1992 Joseph A. Lumsdaine Downey Taxpayers United P.O. Box 39293 Downey, CA 90239 RE: Your Request for Advice Our File No. G-92-331 Dear Mr. Lumsdaine: This is in response to your letter requesting advice on behalf of the Downey Taxpayers United (DTU) concerning DTU’s filing requirements pursuant to the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).l/ Because your request seeks advice on past conduct, Regulation 18329(b) (8) (A) (copy enclosed) provides that formal written advice must be declined. The Commission’s Enforcement Division will be responding to your letter providing you with general guidance pursuant to Regulation 18329(c) (3) .2/ Sincerely, Scott Hallabrin Acting General Counsel By: Mary Ann Kvasagëj Political Reform Consultant Enclosure 1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et g. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations. 2/ Informal Assistance does not provide the requestor with the immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice. (Government Code Section 83114; 2 Cal. Code of Regs. Section 18329 Cc) (3).) 428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 9$04-0807 • (916)32266
embedding.summary: The FPPC declines Joseph A. Lumsdaine's request for formal written advice on behalf of Downey Taxpayers United regarding campaign filing requirements, citing Regulation 18329(b)(8)(A)'s restriction on advice regarding past conduct, and directs him to the Enforcement Division for informal guidance.
